description: Phase 37: Real End-to-End Testing - Create Playwright test suite under e2e/, docker-compose.test.yml for test environment, visual regression tests, API contract tests, performance regression tests, and cross-app E2E scenarios.
steps: Create e2e/ directory at repo root with package.json (dependencies: @playwright/test, @backstopjs/core or pixelmatch for visual regression)
Create e2e/tsconfig.json for the e2e test project
Update root playwright.config.ts to point testDir to ./e2e/tests, add parallel CI config (Chromium, Firefox, WebKit workers), add visual comparison config
Create docker-compose.test.yml at repo root with: postgres, redis, minio, mailhog, meilisearch (matching dev compose but isolated ports/volumes for test isolation)
Create e2e/tests/auth/ directory with: login.spec.ts, signup.spec.ts, oauth-flow.spec.ts (3 happy-path tests covering QuantMail OAuth2 login, signup, SSO across apps)
Create e2e/tests/chat/ directory with: send-message.spec.ts, group-chat.spec.ts, file-sharing.spec.ts (3 happy-path tests for QuantChat core flows)
Create e2e/tests/mail/ directory with: compose-send.spec.ts, search.spec.ts, folders.spec.ts (3 happy-path tests for QuantMail)
Create e2e/tests/ai/ directory with: new-session.spec.ts, tool-use.spec.ts, history.spec.ts (3 happy-path tests for QuantAI)
Create e2e/tests/tube/ directory with: upload.spec.ts, browse-feed.spec.ts, comments.spec.ts (3 happy-path tests for QuantTube)
Create e2e/tests/neon/ directory with: create-post.spec.ts, interactions.spec.ts, explore.spec.ts (3 happy-path tests for QuantNeon)
Create e2e/tests/sync/ directory with: sync-file.spec.ts, share-folder.spec.ts (2 happy-path tests for QuantSync)
Create e2e/tests/ads/ directory with: create-campaign.spec.ts, analytics.spec.ts, budget.spec.ts (3 happy-path tests for QuantAds)

Create e2e/tests/cross-app/ directory with: mail-to-chat.spec.ts, drive-to-docs.spec.ts, calendar-to-meet.spec.ts, ai-across-apps.spec.ts, neon-to-tube.spec.ts, chat-to-meet.spec.ts, ads-analytics-cross.spec.ts, sync-drive-integration.spec.ts, universal-search.spec.ts, workflow-chain.spec.ts (10 cross-app E2E tests)
Create e2e/tests/visual/ directory with: visual-regression.spec.ts using pixelmatch/playwright screenshots for key pages (login, chat list, mail inbox, AI chat, feed)
Create e2e/tests/api/ directory with: contract-validation.spec.ts that validates API responses against OpenAPI-style schemas (identity, chat-api, mail-api endpoints)
Create e2e/tests/performance/ directory with: performance-regression.spec.ts measuring page load times, API response times, setting thresholds
Create e2e/fixtures/ directory with: test-data.ts (seeded test users, conversations, emails), auth-helpers.ts (login utilities for tests)
Add 'e2e' workspace entry to pnpm-workspace.yaml or ensure e2e/package.json works as standalone
Add script to root package.json: 'test:e2e': 'playwright test', 'test:e2e:ci': 'playwright test --shard=1/3'
acceptance_criteria: 25+ E2E happy-path test files exist covering all major apps
10 cross-app E2E test files exist in e2e/tests/cross-app/
Visual regression tests capture and compare screenshots
API contract tests validate response schemas
Performance regression tests set measurable thresholds
Playwright config supports parallel CI (Chromium, Firefox, WebKit)
pnpm typecheck passes for e2e project
